case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. COLLEEN LARKIN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE REDUCED FILING FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LARKIN, COLLEEN NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-26-2021
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-22-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-22-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100131635)
